web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/#main) # Choose your Cesium ion plan Every plan includes all Cesium ion's 3D geospatial capabilities, including: **Global 3D Imagery, Terrain, and Buildings • 3D Tiling • Reality Modeling • Reality Analysis** **Streaming • Clipping • Cesium ion Stories • REST API** All prices are in USD | ### Community | ### Commercial | ### Premium | ### Custom | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | #### Free (individual) | #### $149/month (individual)
#### $524/month (team) | #### $499/month (individual)
#### $874/month (team) | [Contact Sales](https://cesium.com/contact/) | | For individual projects and evaluation
Personal and non-commercial use
Support through the Cesium community forum
[Sign Up For Free](https://ion.cesium.com/signup/) | Quotas sized for new commercial projects
Commercial use within your organization \*
Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum
Start with Community and upgrade when you're ready | Designed for projects with an established user base
Commercial use within your organization \*
Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum
Start with Community and upgrade when you're ready | We can design a plan scaled up to support your needs
Commercial use within your organization \*
Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum
Start with Community and contact us when you're ready | Cesium ion Self-Hosted If your enterprise requries the use of Cesium in your own environment, let's talk. ### Questions? Talk to our Sales team. [Contact sales](https://cesium.com/contact/) \\* Integration pricing and licensing Contact us if you plan to integrate Cesium ion into solutions used outside your organization. ## Compare plans | Quotas | ### Community | ### Commercial | ### Premium | ### Custom | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Storage | 5 GB | 50 GB | 250 GB | Based on your need | | Streaming | 15 GB / month | 150 GB / month | 500 GB / month | Based on your need | | Reality Modeling (Technology Preview) | 20 gigapixels / month | 40 gigapixels / month | 100 gigapixels / month | Based on your need | | Reality Analysis | 5 hours / month | 10 hours / month | 25 hours / month | Based on your need | | Global Imagery (Bing Maps, Google Maps; Azure Maps as Technology Preview) | 1,000 sessions / month | 5,000 sessions / month | 10,000 sessions / month | Based on your need | | Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles | 1,000 root tiles / month | 5,000 root tiles / month | 10,000 root tiles / month | Based on your need | | Geocodes | 50,000 / month | 50,000 / month | 50,000 / month | Based on your need | | Clips of Asset Depot Data | 10 clips / month | 25 clips / month | 50 clips / month | Based on your need | | Teams Members (Teams accounts only) | Individual account only | 5 | 5 | Based on your need | [Contact sales for custom plans](https://cesium.com/contact/) ### Community #### Free (individual) For individual projects and evaluation Personal and non-commercial use Support through the Cesium community forum [Sign Up For Free](https://ion.cesium.com/signup/) View plan details #### Storage 5 GB #### Streaming 15 GB / month #### Reality Modeling (Technology Preview) 20 gigapixels / month #### Reality Analysis 5 hours / month #### Global Imagery (Bing Maps, Google Maps; Azure Maps as Technology Preview) 1,000 sessions / month #### Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles 1,000 root tiles / month #### Geocodes 50,000 / month #### Clips of Asset Depot Data 10 clips / month #### Teams Members (Teams accounts only) Individual account only ### Commercial #### $149/month (individual) #### $524/month (team) Quotas sized for new commercial projects Commercial use within your organization \* Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum Start with Community and upgrade when you're ready View plan details #### Storage 50 GB #### Streaming 150 GB / month #### Reality Modeling (Technology Preview) 40 gigapixels / month #### Reality Analysis 10 hours / month #### Global Imagery (Bing Maps, Google Maps; Azure Maps as Technology Preview) 5,000 sessions / month #### Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles 5,000 root tiles / month #### Geocodes 50,000 / month #### Clips of Asset Depot Data 25 clips / month #### Teams Members (Teams accounts only) 5 ### Premium #### $499/month (individual) #### $874/month (team) Designed for projects with an established user base Commercial use within your organization \* Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum Start with Community and upgrade when you're ready View plan details #### Storage 250 GB #### Streaming 500 GB / month #### Reality Modeling (Technology Preview) 100 gigapixels / month #### Reality Analysis 25 hours / month #### Global Imagery (Bing Maps, Google Maps; Azure Maps as Technology Preview) 10,000 sessions / month #### Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles 10,000 root tiles / month #### Geocodes 50,000 / month #### Clips of Asset Depot Data 50 clips / month #### Teams Members (Teams accounts only) 5 ### Custom [Contact Sales](https://cesium.com/contact/) We can design a plan scaled up to support your needs Commercial use within your organization \* Support from Cesium experts and through the Cesium community forum Start with Community and contact us when you're ready View plan details #### Storage Based on your need #### Streaming Based on your need #### Reality Modeling (Technology Preview) Based on your need #### Reality Analysis Based on your need #### Global Imagery (Bing Maps, Google Maps; Azure Maps as Technology Preview) Based on your need #### Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles Based on your need #### Geocodes Based on your need #### Clips of Asset Depot Data Based on your need #### Teams Members (Teams accounts only) Based on your need Cesium ion Self-Hosted If your enterprise requries the use of Cesium in your own environment, let's talk. ### Questions? Talk to our Sales team. [Contact sales](https://cesium.com/contact/) \\* Integration pricing and licensing Contact us if you plan to integrate Cesium ion into solutions used outside your organization. ## Frequently asked questions ### When do I need a paid account with a commercial license? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#when-do-i-need-a-paid-account-with-a-commercial-li) - If your company currently makes more than $50K in annual gross revenues or has raised funds in excess of $50K, or - If you are working on a government project, or - If you are working on funded educational research, or - If you exceed the usage limits of the free community account The free community account can be used for - Non-commercial personal projects, or - Exploratory commercial or government development, e.g., evaluating if Cesium ion will meet your needs, or - Unfunded educational activities If you are not sure if you need a free or paid account, [contact our sales team](https://cesium.com/contact/). ### What data is included in Global Imagery, and how is Global Imagery usage calculated? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-data-is-included-in-global-imagery-and-how-i) Cesium ion provides third-party commercial global imagery assets for your projects, including data from Bing Maps, Google Maps, and Azure Maps. There are assets for multiple use cases, such as satellite imagery, satellite imagery with labels, labels only, and roadmaps. Third-party commercial data usage is measured in sessions. If you use a combination of Global Imagery data sources in a quota period, the sessions for all sources are combined to measure your usage for that period. Azure Maps imagery is currently available as a Technology Preview. It should not be used for production. ### What payment options do you support? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-payment-options-do-you-support) We accept all major credit and debit cards, as well as direct bank transfers from US banks. To pay via purchase order, [contact our sales team](https://cesium.com/contact/). ### Do you support annual billing? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#do-you-support-annual-billing) You can choose whether to get billed monthly or annually when you upgrade to a paid tier. ### How are apps and end users counted? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#how-are-apps-and-end-users-counted) All Cesium ion plans have no limit to the number of apps and end users for your apps. You can build as many applications as you would like that use the same Cesium ion account for streaming 3D assets. There is also no limit to the number of unique end users that access your apps. All of the usage generated by your apps and end users just needs to fit into the usage limits of your Cesium ion account. ### What are the best practices for maximizing ion usage? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-are-the-best-practices-for-maximizing-ion-usa) See [Understanding and Optimizing ion Quotas](https://cesium.com/learn/ion/optimizing-quotas/). ### What if my credit card is canceled and I miss a payment? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-if-my-credit-card-is-canceled-and-i-miss-a-pa) No worries, it happens. We will contact you. ### Where do I go for support? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#where-do-i-go-for-support) Post your question on the [Cesium community forum](http://community.cesium.com/) to get an answer from Cesium team members and others in the community and to contribute to a knowledge base that helps everyone. ### What does support by Cesium experts mean? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-does-support-by-cesium-experts-mean) While we do our best to respond to everyone, users with a commercial, premium, or custom account can expect guaranteed and faster responses on the [Cesium community forum](http://community.cesium.com/) and may also [submit requests](https://community.cesium.com/new-message?groupname=support) for individualized support from Cesium staff on topics too sensitive to post to the community forum. ### What if I have a question I need to ask in private? [Deep link to this section](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/\#what-if-i-have-a-question-i-need-to-ask-in-private) [Send us a private message](https://community.cesium.com/new-message?groupname=support) on the community forum. ## Looking for more information? Contact our sales team [Contact us](https://cesium.com/contact/)

## post by RikM on Aug 7, 2018

[![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/r/9dc877/48.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[RikM](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[Aug 2018](https://community.cesium.com/t/cesium-ion-free-conditions/7269 "Post date")

Hello everyone,

as annunced on 1 september the AGI STK Server will be shutted off, i am worried for my website that is based on it !

I know that the new Cesium ION consider also a free usage but i think that, also if my website is free to use, i don’t meet the free conditions because i have more than 1000 sessions/month.

Do you know if really 1000 sessions/month is the limit for free usage of Ceisum ION? It is so also for free use websites?

Thank you

392
views
1
link


[![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/r/9dc877/48.png)3](https://community.cesium.com/u/RikM "RikM")

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/matt_amato/48/1993_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/Matt_Amato "Matt_Amato")

## post by RikM on Aug 8, 2018

[![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/r/9dc877/48.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[RikM](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[Aug 2018](https://community.cesium.com/t/cesium-ion-free-conditions/7269/2 "Post date")

Try again…

on the new Cesium ION website is written :

**ion accounts are free for non-commercial and non-government use and give you access to 3D content such as Cesium World Terrain as well as 5 GB of storage for cloud-based 3D tiling.**

so, to use it in downloading terrain tiles for free is only needed to be a non-commercial non-governament site or there are other limitations as the 1000 sessions/month?

It is not clear to me, please if somebody can help!

## post by Matt\_Amato on Aug 8, 2018

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/matt_amato/48/1993_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/matt_amato)

[Matt\_Amato](https://community.cesium.com/u/matt_amato)

[Aug 2018](https://community.cesium.com/t/cesium-ion-free-conditions/7269/3 "Post date")

1000 sessions/month is specifically for Bing imagery, other assets, such as Sentinel-2 and Cesium World Terrain, are purely based on the amount of data that is streamed. Depending on how popular your site is, there’s a good chance you still qualify for the free usage tier. Please check out the ion pricing page for a complete breakdown of what qualifies for free usage: [https://cesium.com/pricing/](https://cesium.com/pricing/)

If things still aren’t clear, please reach out to [tim@cesium.com](mailto:tim@cesium.com) directly for guidance.

Hope that helps,

Matt

## post by RikM on Aug 8, 2018

[![](https://avatars.discourse-cdn.com/v4/letter/r/9dc877/48.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[RikM](https://community.cesium.com/u/rikm)

[Aug 2018](https://community.cesium.com/t/cesium-ion-free-conditions/7269/4 "Post date")

Thank you, yes now it is more clear! ![:slight_smile:](https://emoji.discourse-cdn.com/twitter/slight_smile.png?v=9)

Reading on the Cesium Ion price page i did confuse the Cesium World Terrain streaming with the Bing Imagery streaming. However seems to be strange that is more limited the use of a data source that is external to the Cesium server!

If I use Cesium ION resources for streaming imagery tiles (Sentinel) there is no sessions limitation and instead if a stream from an external server as Bing i was limited by Cesium… whats the sense? ![:open_mouth:](https://emoji.discourse-cdn.com/twitter/open_mouth.png?v=9)

Reply

Invalid date

Invalid date

# [Question about pricing after the free period ends on May 31](https://community.cesium.com/t/question-about-pricing-after-the-free-period-ends-on-may-31/13138)

[Cesium ion](https://community.cesium.com/c/cesium-ion/9)

Apr 2021


[Apr 2021](https://community.cesium.com/t/question-about-pricing-after-the-free-period-ends-on-may-31/13138/3)

## post by ILikeHighEndGraphics on Apr 13, 2021

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/ilikehighendgraphics/48/3458_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/ilikehighendgraphics)

[ILikeHighEndGraphics](https://community.cesium.com/u/ilikehighendgraphics)

1

[Apr 2021](https://community.cesium.com/t/question-about-pricing-after-the-free-period-ends-on-may-31/13138 "Post date")

If I understand correctly, we will need a subscription after end of May to use Cesium in Unreal Engine.

I saw different subscription models which basically provided different GB/month that I can download from your servers. Obviously, more GB more expensive.

My question is if this is location based or raw streaming. I noticed that when I turn around in Cesium, tiles will unload and when I turn back around, they are loaded in again. Are those tiles actually streamed in again as they load back in and will cost me GB? Not going to nitpick, by my GB/month will be exhausted in no-time if I just drive on a roundabout for 10mins…

1.1k
views
2
links


[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/shehzan_mohammed/48/2002_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/Shehzan_Mohammed "Shehzan_Mohammed")

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/unrealvistas/48/7325_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/UnrealVistas "UnrealVistas")

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/ilikehighendgraphics/48/3458_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/ILikeHighEndGraphics "ILikeHighEndGraphics")

## post by UnrealVistas on Apr 15, 2021

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/unrealvistas/48/7325_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/unrealvistas)

[UnrealVistas](https://community.cesium.com/u/unrealvistas)

[Apr 2021](https://community.cesium.com/t/question-about-pricing-after-the-free-period-ends-on-may-31/13138/2 "Post date")

I only want a couple of small areas maybe 5km2 in total. How can i keep on using them without paying for the privilege every month? I’m not technically a community project, just a small single user interested in landscapes. Developing platforms for future commercial benefit maybe, but not for the next year or so at least. Should i just go back to the traditional heightmaps i was using?

## post by Shehzan\_Mohammed on Apr 15, 2021

[![](https://sea2.discourse-cdn.com/cesium/user_avatar/community.cesium.com/shehzan_mohammed/48/2002_2.png)](https://community.cesium.com/u/shehzan_mohammed)

[Shehzan\_Mohammed](https://community.cesium.com/u/shehzan_mohammed)[Cesium Team](https://community.cesium.com/g/support)

[Apr 2021](https://community.cesium.com/t/question-about-pricing-after-the-free-period-ends-on-may-31/13138/3 "Post date")

Hi All

Yes, starting June 1, you will need a paid Cesium ion subscription to use Cesium ion for commercial use. Cesium ion will continue to have a free community tier for personal use. You can read more about requirements for community/commercial use in the FAQ section of the [pricing page](https://cesium.com/platform/cesium-ion/pricing/).

CesiumJS and Cesium for Unreal both use client-side caching, and Cesium ion uses Amazon CloudFront CDN. So if you see tiles loading and unloading, or if you visit the same areas across different sessions, these will pick up tiles from the cache, and using cache does not impact your Cesium ion streaming usage.

You can track your Cesium ion usage at [Cesium ion](https://cesium.com/ion/usage).

All that said, we will be diving deep into our pricing structure and will be looking into how we can better serve the community. This includes taking another look at our quotas, features like downloading 3D Tiles and more.

Reply

Invalid date

Invalid date
